continuity_tokens: same Japanese professional in early 30s across shots 01 to 03
ivory or soft grey knit workwear
clean desk styling with restrained objects only
visual_intent: strong negative space for later typography
brand_guardrails: keep the mood calm, premium, and believable
the scene must fill the entire 9:16 canvas with no white bands, blank bars, inset-card framing, floating panel behavior, or smaller image area inside the frame
composition: generous top-third text-safe space inside the room scene itself
extend the environment naturally to the top and bottom edges of the canvas
no blank white top or bottom padding and no letterbox-style empty zones
reference_strategy: Use editorial whitespace as the dominant control, then use the cool-palette anchor for soft steel-blue morning light and premium calm.
variation_guardrails: do not copy an exact pose from the references
keep the workspace simpler and more lived-in than a campaign set
preserve subject, wardrobe, and light continuity for later shots
reject and regenerate if the frame looks like a square or near-square image placed inside a taller canvas
reject and regenerate if top or bottom whitespace appears as blank bars instead of real in-scene breathing room

text_overlay.font_reference: Noto Sans JP or closest available sans-serif for Japanese

notes: Shot 01 opening hook. Hard lock full-bleed 9:16 scene from edge to edge. Show a busy but composed morning desk moment that makes the viewer feel recognized immediately. Text-safe room must come from real composition, not white padding.
